doctrine: Externalized status manifest for the CGG agent fleet. Per-agent runtime status metadata (status, activity_state, parity_state, routing_state, validation source, decision_required, resolution lineage). Source-of-truth: this manifest. Agent prompt bodies carry only a status_ref pointer to this file.

axes.activity_state: exercise evidence (active | episodic | dormant_by_design | dormant_unexercised | dormant_bypassed | fallback_unused | mechanical_worker)
axes.parity_state: installed sync proof (verified | drifted | missing_installed | unowned | pending)

arena-report-agent.notes: Trigger-manifest arena.pressure + arena.harpoon_assessment. Post-arena pressure-report ingest. Sync evidence at tic 188.

cbux-steward.notes: Trigger-manifest cbux.feedback_ingress + cbux.experience_audit; mailbox carries 4 active WAIT routing entries. Bootstrapped tic 89; never operationally exercised. Activation probe candidate when useful (do NOT retire — Architect hard hold).
cbux-steward.resolution_verdict: APPROVE BOUNDED ACTIVATION PROBE; HARD HOLD on retirement

civil-engineer.notes: Single invocation tic 51 (March 14, 2026); silent 169 tics. Bypass condition resolved at tic 220 — civil-engineer dispatched for one bounded `civil_status_check` (depth: standard); produced 2 novel findings Mogul + matrix + validation artifact missed (registry_audit: 3 unregistered specs `ent_arena_report_agent`, `ent_pattern_curator_direct`, `ent_pattern_curator_meta`; health_check: duplicate signal in tic-220 conformation explaining 3-vs-4 active-signals disagreement). Independent-audit-value test PASSED. Cadence restart recommended — bypass was a Mogul cycle-detection gap, not a civil-spec defect. Activity state advanced from `dormant_bypassed` to `episodic`. WAIT envelopes unrelated to trigger residue (see cgg-mailbox-hygiene-docket-tic220.md C2). Mailbox state held; 4 stale WAITs await Architect mailbox-hygiene authorization.

containment-operator.notes: Steward-directed wire-cut arming. Constitutional affordance; absence of use reflects operational health.

cpr-stepper.notes: Model upgraded haiku → sonnet at tic 219 per federation KI tic 207 (spec-runtime alignment). /loop skill target. Append-only queue.jsonl semantics with latest-entry-per-id-wins read.

crisis-sentinel.notes: Trigger-manifest crisis.signal_storm_detected + crisis.mandate_pileup_detected. Boundary with /siren skill: skill operates manifold; sentinel scans for crisis patterns. Distinct.

crisis-steward.notes: Architect-gated; 84-tic zero-warrant streak reflects operational stability, not vestigiality. Office of Crisis Response holder.

ladder-auditor.notes: Mogul team T1 + T9; 5-tic ladder cycle (tic % 5 == 0); team-merged output.

mogul.notes: Trigger-manifest mogul.mandate; SessionStart mandate emission; cycle-reports/2026-05-03T011856-tic-218.report.json confirms tic 218 run.

pattern-curator-direct.notes: Mogul team T4; 4-tic pattern_mining cycle (next tic 220). Blindness Rule enforced.

pattern-curator-meta.notes: Mogul team T3; 4-tic pattern_mining cycle (next tic 220). Blindness Rule enforced.

pattern-curator.notes: Functionally superseded by adversarial pair (pattern-curator-direct + pattern-curator-meta) in standard governance flows. Architect decision pending: archive or clarify the tier-1/2-only fallback contract.

prevention-architect.notes: Read-only CogPR distillation surface; routes through /review pipeline. Distinct from resolution-analyst.

resolution-analyst.notes: Steward-dispatched post-restoration root-cause investigation. Distinct from prevention-architect (cause vs pattern).

restoration-operator.notes: Triple-source-sync discipline (registry + filesystem + hook-detection state) is named but never exercised under real crisis conditions. Tabletop validation candidate.
restoration-operator.resolution_verdict: APPROVE TABLETOP SPEC AUTHORING (not live drill)

review-execute.notes: /review skill subagent dispatch. Sync evidence at tic 209 + tic 210. Properly upgraded haiku → sonnet per tic 207 federation alignment. Exemplar mechanical executor.

ripple-assessor.notes: Trigger-manifest declares ripple.assessment routing to ent_ripple_assessor, but the mailbox does not exist. Output flows to ~/.claude/grapple-proposals/latest.md per agent hard constraint. Decision needed: create mailbox or clarify trigger declaration.
ripple-assessor.resolution_verdict: CLARIFY + RECEIPT MIRROR (primary deterministic path preserved; mirror added)

videographer.notes: Bounded-delegation lesson inscribed at tic 219 per federation KI tic 198. Office/Holder mailbox split inscribed tic 220 — `ent_office_videographer` = office entity (persistent constitutional surface, governance/broadcast deliveries); `ent_videographer` = holder alias (operational dispatch target, runtime envelopes). Both mailboxes persist; no movement, deletion, or migration. First explicit Office/Holder mailbox inscription in the federation; pattern is a candidate for application to other constitutional offices.
